economic_notes: Nak'azdli has interests in logging, LNG, a grocery store, gas station, timber, mining camp, and bioNorth operations. BioNorth Holdings LP (40% owned) had revenues of $42.3M and profit of $5.47M in 2024. NDC LNG LP generated $848K revenue. Carrier Food & Fuel Ltd revenue $11.4M. Commitment to sell timber to Apollo Forest Products Ltd at fair market value.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 9 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 7 entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs and government business partnerships). Sana'aih Market LP and Shas Resources LP were reclassified from GBE to fully consolidated in 2024 (previously equity-accounted). Total revenue includes consolidated government business revenues of $7.6M. Net financial assets of $74.4M is strong. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $9,390,692 + FNHA $2,622,428 + PGNAETA $853,142 + Province of BC $8,420,920 + CMHC $255,683 = $21,542,865. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayment only ($155,331); capital lease repayment was an additional $9,946.
